scripts.test:baseline: npm run test:api && npm run test:web && npm run lint:web && npm run typecheck:web && npm run test:e2e:web && npm run test:schemas && npm run test:safety && python scripts/validate-resource-registry.py
scripts.test:schemas: python scripts/validate-graph-schemas.py tests/fixtures/graph-provenance/synthetic-graph.json tests/fixtures/graph-provenance/typed-claim-eval-contract.json && for fixture in tests/fixtures/graph-provenance/recommendation-missing-source-span.json tests/fixtures/graph-provenance/recommendation-missing-source-span-field.json tests/fixtures/graph-provenance/evidence-item-missing-source-span-field.json tests/fixtures/graph-provenance/evidence-item-empty-source-span.json tests/fixtures/graph-provenance/funding-rule-missing-source-span-field.json tests/fixtures/graph-provenance/funding-rule-empty-source-span.json tests/fixtures/graph-provenance/model-trace-missing-provenance.json; do ! python scripts/validate-graph-schemas.py "$fixture" || exit 1; done
